blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
